description: Button designed for use inside TmToolbar. Supports icon-only, text-only, or icon+text layouts with ghost, primary, and danger variants.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: Button label text. Omit for icon-only buttons.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Icon name from IconNames. Displayed before the text.

parameters.name: Tooltip
parameters.description: Tooltip text shown as the native title attribute.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Fires when the button is clicked.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the button is disabled.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class for the button element.

examples.title: Primary variant with text and icon
